summary: Surah Ar-Rum discusses the defeat and subsequent victory of the Romans, highlighting the fulfillment of Allah’s promise and the rejoicing of believers. It emphasizes the signs of Allah in creation, the resurrection, and the consequences of faith and disbelief. The surah encourages reflection, patience, and gratitude, warns against arrogance, and stresses that true success lies in obedience to Allah and the life of the Hereafter.

groups.title: Section: Prophecy: Romans’ Defeat and Imminent Victory; Believers Rejoice
